zh.Whalesborough, Stratton, Cornwall, Engla: 英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Matilda Bowes於1407年出生在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛時，她的父親Robert Bowes32歲，母親Jane Conyers31歲。她於大約1429年與Sir Thomas Whalesborough在英國英格蘭可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年12月23日在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Matilda Bowes was born in 1407, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, her father, Robert Bowes, was 32 and her mother, Jane Conyers, was 31. She married Sir Thomas Whalesborough about 1429, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 23 December 1484, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Matilda Bowes est née en 1407, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bowes, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Conyers, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Whalesborough environ 1429, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1484, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda Bowes(이)가 1407년 영국 코른월 화알스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bowes(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Conyers(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 화알스버루그h에서 Sir Thomas Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 12월 23일 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Whalesborough aproximadamente 1429, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Matilda Bowes родилась в 1407 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Bowes было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Conyers, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Whalesborough около 1429 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 декабря 1484 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.
